/usr/bin/ar qc libnet.a CMakeFiles/net.dir/net/acceptor/Accept.cc.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/net/buffer/Buffer.cc.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/net/channel/Channel.cc.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/net/eventloop/EventLoop.cc.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/net/eventloop/EventLoopThread.cc.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/net/eventloop/EventLoopThreadPool.cc.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/net/inetaddress/InetAddress.cc.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/net/poller/Poller.cc.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/net/poller/epollpoller/EPollPoller.cc.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/net/socket/Socket.cc.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/net/timer/Timer.cc.o CMakeFiles/net.dir/net/timer/TimerQueue.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libnet.a
